CS101.title: Introduction to Programming
CS101.description: Fundamentals of programming: variables, control flow, functions, and basic problem solving.

CS102.title: Python Programming
CS102.description: Core Python syntax, data structures, file I/O, and writing small scripts and programs.

WD101.title: HTML & CSS Foundations
WD101.description: Building and styling static web pages with semantic HTML and modern CSS.

WD102.title: JavaScript Essentials
WD102.description: Core JavaScript: DOM manipulation, events, async programming, and browser basics.

WD201.title: Modern Frontend Frameworks
WD201.description: Building interactive UIs with a component-based framework (e.g. React) and state management.

WD202.title: Backend Development with Node & Python
WD202.description: Building REST APIs, server-side logic, authentication, and application architecture.

DB101.title: Databases & SQL
DB101.description: Relational database design, SQL querying, indexing, and basic data modeling.

WD301.title: Full-Stack Capstone Project
WD301.description: End-to-end build of a full-stack web application integrating frontend, backend, and a database.

MATH101.title: Statistics for Data Science
MATH101.description: Descriptive and inferential statistics, probability, and hypothesis testing for data work.

MATH102.title: Linear Algebra Fundamentals
MATH102.description: Vectors, matrices, and linear transformations underpinning ML algorithms.

DS101.title: Data Analysis with Python
DS101.description: Cleaning, exploring, and analyzing datasets using pandas and numpy.

DS102.title: Data Visualization
DS102.description: Communicating insights through effective charts and dashboards (matplotlib, seaborn, plotly).

DS201.title: Machine Learning Foundations
DS201.description: Supervised and unsupervised learning algorithms, model evaluation, and scikit-learn.

DS301.title: Deep Learning
DS301.description: Neural networks, CNNs, RNNs/Transformers, and training with PyTorch or TensorFlow.

DS302.title: MLOps & Model Deployment
DS302.description: Packaging, deploying, monitoring, and maintaining ML models in production.

CL101.title: Cloud Computing Fundamentals
CL101.description: Core cloud concepts: compute, storage, networking, and working with a major cloud provider.

CL201.title: DevOps & CI/CD Basics
CL201.description: Version control workflows, CI/CD pipelines, containers, and infrastructure basics.
